steps.title: Identify the equation structure
steps.content: We have $7x + 10 = 2(6) + 8x$, which simplifies to $7x + 10 = 12 + 8x$. Both sides are sums with variable and constant terms.

steps.title: Rearrange to collect like terms
steps.content:
Subtract $8x$ from both sides and subtract 10 from both sides:
$$7x - 8x = 12 - 10$$
$$-x = 2$$

steps.title: Solve for x
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by $-1$:
$$x = -2$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
